fields.name: hs2HostPort
fields.label: HiveServer2 host:port
fields.help: HiveServer2 endpoint the OM connector dials. For a MANAGED context KDPS computes the HTTP-transport port from hive-site; for an EXTERNAL context, provide it here.

fields.name: scheme
fields.label: Connection scheme
fields.help: hive+https / hive+http / hive. For a MANAGED context KDPS derives it from hive.server2.transport.mode + use.SSL; for an EXTERNAL context, set it here.

fields.name: authMode
fields.label: Authentication
fields.help: kerberos / ldap / none. For a MANAGED context KDPS derives it from hive.server2.authentication.

fields.name: servicePrincipal
fields.label: Hive service principal (SPN)
fields.help: The Kerberos service principal of the backend Hive Metastore / HiveServer2 (e.g. CDP). Sets hive.metastore.service.principal in the Trino Hive catalog. Only needed for an EXTERNAL context whose Hive is in a different realm than the Ambari cluster.

fields.name: clientPrincipal
fields.label: Hive client principal
fields.help: The Kerberos principal the deployed service authenticates AS to the backend Hive — this MUST match the principal inside the external keytab you provide at deploy time. Sets hive.metastore.client.principal / hive.hdfs.trino.principal in the Trino Hive catalog. EXTERNAL contexts only.
